name: 2 Bed Chalet
descriptionShort: Cottage 7 elevates the cottage experience. This beautifully appointed two-storey chalet features a stunning loft king bedroom above and a spacious main-floor king suite below.
descriptionLong:
Cottage 7 elevates the cottage experience. This beautifully appointed two-storey chalet features a stunning loft king bedroom above and a spacious main-floor king suite below — offering two private retreats under one roof. Whether you're here as a couple seeking extra room to spread out, or two couples sharing a getaway, the layout is as thoughtful as it is comfortable.

The heart of the chalet is its living and dining area, anchored by a crackling fireplace that sets the mood on cool Calabogie evenings. A full kitchen, 32 inch flat screen TV with satellite, and air conditioning ensure every creature comfort is covered. Outside, a barbecue and bonfire pit invite evenings under the stars. A sofa bed adds flexible sleeping options for a growing party.
Address: 5253 Calabogie Road, Calabogie, Ontario K0J 1H0, Canada
shortDescription: Spacious 2-bedroom Lakeside House in Calabogie with backyard and modern amenities...
